In its current state, a faster processor will allow faster auto-battle computations, leading to less downtime. However, when manual battles are added, better graphics capabilities will likely be preferential. In any case, our goal is to make the game perform well on a wide variety of hardware, so let us know if you run into issues! Multiplayer will require an internet connection when it is implemented.
